query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Ottawa gas prices investigation reveals possible price gouging
articles.description: “It’s very interesting how after we passed a resolution looking into gas prices, that gas prices in Ottawa went down,” Commissioner Tom Ganiere said during Tuesday night’s council meeting.

articles.title: Tensions Surge: U.S. Strikes Iran Amidst Oil Route Threats
articles.description: The U.S. launched strikes on Iran to keep the Strait of Hormuz open, as Iran attacked American sites in retaliation. The clash follows failed peace talks and affects global oil prices, highlighting Tehran's strategic leverage over the crucial waterway amid ongoing negotiations.

articles.title: Market Jitters: Oil Prices Surge, Stocks Slide Amid Middle East Tensions
articles.description: Global markets faced volatility as oil prices surged due to heightened Middle East tensions. The Dow Jones dropped significantly, while concerns over inflation were fueled by new U.S. Federal Reserve insights. The IMF warns of impacted global growth, adding to investor concerns as treasury yields rise and gold prices drop.

articles.title: Standoff at Strait: U.S. and Iran in Critical Confrontation
articles.description: The U.S. military has launched fresh attacks on Iran to keep the Strait of Hormuz open, following Iranian strikes on U.S. sites. This escalation threatens a recently signed memorandum, raising oil prices and challenging ongoing peace negotiations between the two countries.

articles.title: 3 Energy ETFs for a Renewed Rally in Oil
articles.description: America's ceasefire with Iran looks all but over, and oil prices have started to rebound. These energy ETFs are among the top beneficiaries.

articles.title: 2 TSX Stocks I’d Buy Today as Oil Prices Keep Swinging

articles.title: Oil prices rise, and stocks drop worldwide after Trump says ceasefire with Iran is 'over'
articles.description: Oil prices rose, and stock markets dropped in shaky trading worldwide after President Donald Trump raised doubts about the temporary truce in the war with Iran

articles.title: US launches fresh wave of strikes on Iran after Trump declares ceasefire over
articles.description: Renewed hostilities over the strategic Strait of Hormuz waterway have led to another spike in oil prices

articles.title: Beyond the War Premium: How Strategic Reserves Create a New Floor for Oil Prices
articles.description: Oil pricing is a balance of two curves. Bears look only at stagnating demand, ignoring depleting cheap reserves and soaring capex. Meanwhile, geopolitical risks are sparking a boom in strategic storage.
